description: No unit applicable; the attribute is dimensionless or textual
Percentage — a proportion expressed as a fraction of one hundred
Kilograms of CO2 equivalent per kilowatt-hour of battery energy — carbon intensity metric
Kilograms of CO2 equivalent — total greenhouse gas emission expressed in CO2 mass equivalent
Ampere-hour — unit of electric charge representing one ampere flowing for one hour
Watt-hour — unit of energy equal to one watt of power sustained for one hour
Volt — SI unit of electrical potential difference
Watt — SI unit of power, equal to one joule per second
Watts per watt-hour — ratio expressing the power-to-energy relationship of a battery
Ohm — SI unit of electrical resistance
Calendar years — duration measured in full Gregorian years
Degrees Celsius — unit of temperature on the Celsius scale
Amperes per ampere-hour — C-rate expressing charge or discharge current relative to capacity
Seconds — SI base unit of time
